title: Efficiency packages
description: Schema for rows in roles/<role_id>/efficiency_packages.csv. Each row describes a role-local selectable efficiency package for one milestone year.

role_id.description: Role that owns this efficiency package.

package_id.description: Stable role-local identifier for the efficiency package.

year.description: Milestone year represented by this row.

package_description.description: Plain-language description of the package and what it changes.

applicable_method_ids.description: JSON-encoded array of explicit method_id values that the package may modify.

affected_input_commodities.description: JSON-encoded array of affected commodity identifiers.

input_multipliers.description: JSON-encoded array of numeric multipliers aligned with affected_input_commodities.

delta_output_cost_per_unit.description: Additive change to output_cost_per_unit relative to the base method in the same role and year.

cost_basis_year.description: Base year used to normalize delta_output_cost_per_unit.

max_share.description: Optional upper bound on the share of applicable activity this package may reach.

rollout_limit_notes.description: Narrative explanation for rollout, adoption, or eligibility limits.

evidence_summary.description: Short summary of the evidence base.

derivation_method.description: Brief note on how the row was derived, scaled, or interpolated.

non_stacking_group.description: Optional role-local group used to prevent overlapping packages from stacking on the same activity slice.
